creator: n.diablo.n.f@list.ru
text:
Created attachment 215795
screenshots

After upgrading to version 6.4.4, Impress experienced problems with displaying fonts (you can see it on screenshots). Button icons also sometimes disappear, the entire interface turns gray (observed in all LibreOffice applications). In addition, fonts are not displayed as before.

# pkg info libreoffice
